query: /* select#1 */ select `testdb`.`products`.`id` AS `id`,`testdb`.`products`.`name` AS `name`,`testdb`.`products`.`category_id` AS `category_id`,`testdb`.`products`.`price` AS `price`,`testdb`.`products`.`stock` AS `stock`,`testdb`.`products`.`created_at` AS `created_at` from `testdb`.`products` where (`testdb`.`products`.`price` > 800.00)
operation: Index range scan on products using idx_price over (800.00 < price), with index condition: (products.price > 800.00)
